atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing right knee pain two weeks ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a twist of his knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hearing a pop at the time of the injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports wearing a brace

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using THC cream for pain relief

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his left knee does not hurt

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports instability in his left knee

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports previous surgery on his right knee at age 14

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of problems with his knee since that time

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a high pain tolerance

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports continuing to ski and ski very well

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain exacerbated by walking for longer periods of time

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain exacerbated by walking his dog

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals mild swelling and bruising on the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient demonstrates a slight limp.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited, with decreased active abduction.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pain is elicited with impingement testing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsiflexion causes pain, while plantar flexion does not.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's gait is affected, exhibiting a noticeable limp.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with a strained posterior cruciate ligament in the right knee, likely secondary to the previous injury and skiing incident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinical findings suggest moderate pain and functional limitations, consistent with a postero-lateral corner injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am prescribing meloxicam 15mg once daily for pain and inflammation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am prescribing ibuprofen 800mg twice daily as needed for the left knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I recommend avoiding skiing and gymnastics activities until physical therapy is complete.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am recommending physical therapy three times a week to help restore strength and range of motion to the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Please schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks to assess progress and adjust treatment as needed.
